signals.title: Cinema Under the Stars - Open Air Screenings
signals.location: Various city parks (Mladezhki Hill, Lauta Park), Plovdiv
signals.reason: Free outdoor film screenings held in pleasant park settings, ideal for a casual evening outing under summer skies.
signals.note: Plovdiv frequently hosts outdoor cinema screenings in city parks during summer.

signals.title: World Rowing Under 19 Championships
signals.reason: Watching fast-paced rowers from around the world along the wide, stroller-friendly tree-lined canal is visually exciting for a 4-year-old.
signals.note: The World Rowing U19 Championships at the Rowing Canal in Plovdiv are confirmed for 2026.

signals.title: Shake That Hill: Eldoria 2026 Festival
signals.reason: A vibrant open-air festival on Youth Hill featuring daytime craft workshops, art installations, and grassy spaces for kids to play.
signals.note: Shake That Hill is a verified annual open-air festival held on Youth Hill in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Regional Natural History Museum Plovdiv
signals.reason: Explicitly loved by the family; features an impressive sea aquarium, terrarium, live butterfly house, and life-sized dinosaur animatronics.
signals.note: Verified evergreen museum in central Plovdiv with family-friendly interactive exhibits.

signals.title: Day Trip to Stara Zagora Zoo
signals.location: Ayazmoto Park, Stara Zagora (~60 min drive)
signals.reason: Explicitly highlighted as a family favorite; set in a deeply shaded forest park with wide, gentle paths and diverse animal exhibits.
signals.note: Verified zoo in Stara Zagora, approximately 60 minutes' drive from Plovdiv.

signals.title: Aviation Museum Krumovo
signals.location: Plovdiv Airport area, Krumovo (~15 min drive)
signals.reason: Just 15 minutes away with huge open-air grounds where kids can wander around real fighter jets, transport planes, and helicopters.
signals.note: Verified museum in Krumovo, situated within a 15-minute drive of Plovdiv.

signals.title: Four Seasons Ostrich Farm
signals.reason: A memorable countryside excursion where young children can safely observe giant ostriches up close in a calm rural setting.
signals.note: Verified ostrich farm near Tazha village, within a 90-minute driving radius of Plovdiv.
